channel.title: +लक्ष्मीकान्तशर्मा on संस्कृते विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +लक्ष्मीकान्तशर्मा on संस्कृते विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: अभिनवा पाठावलिः
item.description: [[अभिनवा पाठावलिः Source: EB]] [ [TABLE] First Published 1931 Reprinted 1935 Revised 1937 Printed by M N Kulkarni, at the Karnatak Printing Press, Chira Bazar, Bombay 2, and Published by F E. Francis, Manager, MessrsMacmillan & Co, Ltd., Fort, Bombay PREFACE This is the third book of the “New Sanskrit Readers” Series, intended for use in standard VI in Secondary Schools. It contains a variety of lessons taken from classical works in Sanskrit, modified a little here and there, and graded to suit the stage of instruction.
